productDisplayName: Lotto Men's Stadio Suprema Black White Shoe
description: Value for money, the lotto Stadio Suprema firm ground football boot is a great footwear for beginners. Replete with water repellent and impact protection features, the Stadio Suprema allows your feet to flex perfectly, offering great elastic return of energy.Upper Water-repellent premium plus upper to keep your boots in best possible shape Upper stitched directly to the outsole for increased durability and protection from blistering Knitted lace for extended durability and snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for added comfort and snug fit Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight comfort and enhanced shock absorption Outsole Rearfoot shock-off feature to cuhsion the foot during a hard round of hard ground football Hard rubber spikes lined below the heel and toe counters to enhance performance on hard ground PuntoFlex technology to allow the foot to flex correctly and enhance elastic return of foot Wash careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
